segments.text: This room uses the new engine-owned movement, pushing, facing interaction, and dialogue session commands.
The light crate has weight 1, so the player can push it. The heavy crate is weight 2, so it should just trigger the bump hook for now.
The floor switch by the top wall uses on_occupant_enter and on_occupant_leave to toggle the nearby indicator without hand-written controller JSON.
The terminal near the bottom wall uses the new engine-owned dialogue runtime directly, including an inline choice menu that reads caller data through refs.
The older sample projects stay authored the older way on purpose. This room is just the clean-contract reference.
